tasks.name: Create ActivityItem component

action.target: activity-item.tsx component for single activity display

tasks.purpose: Render individual activity with type indicator, description, and timestamp

constraints: Accept ActivityItem union type as prop
Accept timeAgo string as prop (formatted externally)

tasks.output_state: ActivityItem component renders activity with badge, description, timestamp, and separator
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component accepts ActivityItem and timeAgoText props, renders badge with icon, description text, and relative timestamp
tasks.verification_command: test -f apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/activity-item.tsx && grep -q 'export.*ActivityItem' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/activity-item.tsx && grep -q 'Badge' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/activity-item.tsx && grep -q 'Separator' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/activity-item.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Extract timeAgo utility function
tasks.purpose: Provide reusable i18n-aware relative timestamp formatting

constraints: Accept date string and locale parameters
Support minutes, hours, days, months units

tasks.input_state: timeAgo logic exists only in notifications-popover.tsx
tasks.acceptance_criterion: timeAgo function accepts date string and locale, returns relative time string using Intl.RelativeTimeFormat
tasks.verification_command: test -f apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/utils/time-utils.ts && grep -q 'export.*function timeAgo' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/utils/time-utils.ts && grep -q 'Intl.RelativeTimeFormat' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/utils/time-utils.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Create RecentActivityFeed Server Component skeleton

action.target: recent-activity-feed.tsx Server Component with Card structure

tasks.purpose: Establish feed component structure with header and placeholder content

constraints: Placeholder content initially (no data fetching yet)

tasks.input_state: ActivityItem component and timeAgo utility exist
tasks.output_state: RecentActivityFeed component with Card structure and placeholder
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Server Component exists with Card structure, header, and placeholder text for activity feed
tasks.verification_command: test -f apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/recent-activity-feed.tsx && grep -q 'async.*function.*RecentActivityFeed' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/recent-activity-feed.tsx && grep -q 'Card' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/recent-activity-feed.tsx && grep -q 'CardHeader' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/recent-activity-feed.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add activity type icon mapping

action.target: icon mapping function to ActivityItem component

tasks.purpose: Map activity types to corresponding Lucide icons for visual differentiation

dependencies: lucide-react icons (CheckCircle, Trophy, XCircle, Edit, ClipboardCheck)
constraints: Use switch statement or object mapping

tasks.input_state: ActivityItem component exists without icon logic
tasks.output_state: ActivityItem component renders type-appropriate icon based on activity.type
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component imports Lucide icons and maps each ActivityItem.type to correct icon
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'CheckCircle' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/activity-item.tsx && grep -q 'Trophy' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/activity-item.tsx && grep -q 'Edit' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/activity-item.tsx && grep -q 'ClipboardCheck' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/activity-item.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add activity type badge mapping

action.target: badge variant mapping function to ActivityItem component

tasks.purpose: Map activity types to Badge color variants for visual differentiation

dependencies: Badge variants: success, destructive, info, secondary
constraints: Badge should display activity type label

tasks.input_state: ActivityItem component exists without badge variant logic
tasks.output_state: ActivityItem component renders Badge with type-appropriate variant
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component maps each ActivityItem.type to correct Badge variant using switch or object mapping
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'variant=' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/activity-item.tsx && grep -q 'success' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/activity-item.tsx && grep -q 'destructive' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/activity-item.tsx && grep -q 'info' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/activity-item.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Wire activity loader to feed component
tasks.purpose: Fetch activity data server-side and pass to ActivityItem components

constraints: Call loadActivityFeed with userId and default params (30 days, 20 items)
Map each activity to ActivityItem component with formatted timestamp
Handle errors gracefully (log and show empty state)
Render activities in order (already sorted by loader)

tasks.output_state: RecentActivityFeed fetches data, renders ActivityItem list with formatted timestamps
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component calls loadActivityFeed, maps results to ActivityItem components with timeAgo timestamps, handles errors

tasks.name: Add ScrollArea for fixed-height feed
tasks.purpose: Enable scrolling within fixed-height card for long activity lists
tasks.input_state: Activity list renders without scroll container
tasks.output_state: Activity list wrapped in ScrollArea with fixed height
tasks.acceptance_criterion: ScrollArea wraps activity list, has fixed height class, enables vertical scrolling

tasks.name: Create Show More button component

constraints: Conditionally render only if hasMore is true
No onClick handler yet (T9 will wire it)

tasks.input_state: Feed component shows activities without pagination UI
tasks.output_state: Show More button renders in CardFooter when hasMore is true
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Button exists in CardFooter, conditionally renders based on hasMore, has no onClick yet
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'CardFooter' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/recent-activity-feed.tsx && grep -q 'Show more' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/recent-activity-feed.tsx && grep -q 'hasMore' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/recent-activity-feed.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Wire Show More button to pagination logic

action.target: Show More button to load additional activities

tasks.purpose: Enable client-side pagination to fetch and append more activities

patterns.expected_action: fetch next page of activities and append to list

constraints: Convert to 'use client' component OR extract pagination to separate client component
Maintain Server Component benefits by limiting client interactivity
On click, fetch next page using nextCursor
Append new activities to existing list

tasks.input_state: Show More button renders but has no click handler
tasks.output_state: Show More button fetches and appends activities on click, updates hasMore state
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Button onClick handler calls loadActivityFeed with cursor, appends results to state, updates hasMore, shows loading indicator
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'onClick' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/recent-activity-feed.tsx && grep -q 'useState' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/recent-activity-feed.tsx && grep -qE "'use client'|use client" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/recent-activity-feed.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Create empty state UI

action.target: empty state component for no activity scenario

tasks.purpose: Display contextual message and CTA when user has no recent activity

constraints: Follow research best practices: relevant icon, specific message, single CTA
Context: 'Complete lessons, take quizzes, or create presentations to see your activity here.'
CTA: 'Start Learning' button linking to course page
Center in CardContent when activities array is empty

tasks.input_state: Feed component shows empty content or nothing when no activities
tasks.output_state: Empty state UI with icon, message, context, and CTA button
tasks.acceptance_criterion: When activities.length === 0, render centered empty state with icon, contextual message, and Start Learning button
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'No recent activity' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/recent-activity-feed.tsx && grep -q 'Start Learning' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/recent-activity-feed.tsx && grep -qE 'Calendar|Activity' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/recent-activity-feed.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Wire RecentActivityFeed to dashboard page

action.target: RecentActivityFeed component to user dashboard page

tasks.purpose: Integrate activity feed widget into dashboard layout

dependencies: PageBody or grid container from S1890.I1.F1
constraints: Add to PageBody or dashboard grid
Position according to dashboard layout design
Ensure proper spacing and responsive behavior

tasks.input_state: Dashboard page exists without activity feed widget
tasks.output_state: Dashboard page renders RecentActivityFeed in layout
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Dashboard page imports and renders RecentActivityFeed component in appropriate grid position
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'RecentActivityFeed' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/page.tsx && grep -q "from.*recent-activity-feed" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/page.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add i18n translations for activity feed

action.target: translation keys to dashboard.json locale file

tasks.purpose: Internationalize activity type labels, empty state messages, and button text

constraints: Add keys for each activity type label (lesson_completion, quiz_attempt, etc.)
Add empty state heading and description

tasks.output_state: dashboard.json contains activity feed translation keys
tasks.acceptance_criterion: dashboard.json has activity type labels, empty state messages, button text, and component uses Trans for all text
tasks.verification_command: test -f apps/web/public/locales/en/dashboard.json && grep -q 'activityFeed' apps/web/public/locales/en/dashboard.json && grep -q 'emptyState' apps/web/public/locales/en/dashboard.json && pnpm typecheck
